verses.latin_vulgate: In tempore illo ægrotavit Abia filius Jeroboam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּעֵ֣ת הַהִ֔יא חָלָ֖ה אֲבִיָּ֥ה בֶן־יָרׇבְעָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: At that time Abia, the son of Jeroboam, fell sick.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siihen aikaan sairasti Abia Jerobemin poika.
verses.king_james: At that time Abijah the son of Jeroboam fell sick.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Jeroboam uxori suæ : Surge, et commuta habitum, ne cognoscaris quod sis uxor Jeroboam, et vade in Silo, ubi est Ahias propheta, qui locutus est mihi quod regnaturus essem super populum hunc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יָרׇבְעָ֜ם לְאִשְׁתּ֗וֹ ק֤וּמִי נָא֙ וְהִשְׁתַּנִּ֔ית וְלֹ֣א יֵֽדְע֔וּ כִּי־[אַ֖תְּ] (אתי) אֵ֣שֶׁת יָרׇבְעָ֑ם וְהָלַ֣כְתְּ שִׁלֹ֗ה הִנֵּה־שָׁם֙ אֲחִיָּ֣ה הַנָּבִ֔יא הוּא־דִבֶּ֥ר עָלַ֛י לְמֶ֖לֶךְ עַל־הָעָ֥ם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Jeroboam said to his wife: Arise, and change thy dress, that thou be not known to be the wife of Jeroboam, and go to Silo, where Ahias, the prophet is, who told me that I should reign over this people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jerobeam sanoi emännällensä: nouse ja muuta itses, niin ettei yksikään tuntisi sinua Jerobeamin emännäksi; ja mene Siloon. Katso siellä on propheta Ahia, joka minulle sanoi: että minä olen tuleva tämän kansan kuninkaaksi.
verses.king_james: And Jeroboam said to his wife, Arise, I pray thee, and disguise thyself, that thou be not known to be the wife of Jeroboam; and get thee to Shiloh: behold, there is Ahijah the prophet, which told me that I should be king over this people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tolle quoque in manu tua decem panes, et crustulam, et vas mellis, et vade ad illum : ipse enim indicabit tibi quid eventurum sit puero huic.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלָקַ֣חַתְּ בְּ֠יָדֵ֠ךְ עֲשָׂרָ֨ה לֶ֧חֶם וְנִקֻּדִ֛ים וּבַקְבֻּ֥ק דְּבַ֖שׁ וּבָ֣את אֵלָ֑יו ה֚וּא יַגִּ֣יד לָ֔ךְ מַה־יִּֽהְיֶ֖ה לַנָּֽעַר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Take also with thee ten loaves, and cracknels, and a pot of honey, and go to him: for he will tell thee what will become of this child.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ota kätees kymmenen leipää ja kyrsää, ja astia hunajaa, ja mene hänen tykönsä, että hän sanois sinulle, mitä nuorukaiselle tapahtuu.
verses.king_james: And take with thee ten loaves, and cracknels, and a cruse of honey, and go to him: he shall tell thee what shall become of the child.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit ut dixerat, uxor Jeroboam : et consurgens abiit in Silo, et venit in domum Ahiæ : at ille non poterat videre, quia caligaverant oculi ejus præ senectute.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתַּ֤עַשׂ כֵּן֙ אֵ֣שֶׁת יָרׇבְעָ֔ם וַתָּ֙קׇם֙ וַתֵּ֣לֶךְ שִׁלֹ֔ה וַתָּבֹ֖א בֵּ֣ית אֲחִיָּ֑ה וַאֲחִיָּ֙הוּ֙ לֹא־יָכֹ֣ל לִרְא֔וֹת כִּ֛י קָ֥מוּ עֵינָ֖יו מִשֵּׂיבֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Jeroboam's wife did as he told her: and rising up, went to Silo, and came to the house of Ahias; but he could not see, for his eyes were dim by reason of his age.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jerobeamin emäntä teki niin, nousi ja meni Siloon, ja tuli Ahian huoneesen; mutta ei Ahia taitanut nähdä, sillä hänen silmänsä olivat pimenneet vanhuudesta.
verses.king_james: And Jeroboam’s wife did so, and arose, and went to Shiloh, and came to the house of Ahijah. But Ahijah could not see; for his eyes were set by reason of his age.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit autem Dominus ad Ahiam : Ecce uxor Jeroboam ingreditur ut consulat te super filio suo qui ægrotat : hæc et hæc loqueris ei. Cum ergo illa intraret, et dissimularet se esse quæ erat,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיהֹוָ֞ה אָמַ֣ר אֶל־אֲחִיָּ֗הוּ הִנֵּ֣ה אֵ֣שֶׁת יָרׇבְעָ֡ם בָּאָ֣ה לִדְרֹשׁ֩ דָּבָ֨ר מֵעִמְּךָ֤ אֶל־בְּנָהּ֙ כִּֽי־חֹלֶ֣ה ה֔וּא כָּזֹ֥ה וְכָזֶ֖ה תְּדַבֵּ֣ר אֵלֶ֑יהָ וִיהִ֣י כְבֹאָ֔הּ וְהִ֖יא מִתְנַכֵּרָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Ahias: Behold the wife of Jeroboam cometh in, to consult thee concerning her son, that is sick: thus and thus shalt thou speak to her. So when she was coming in, and made as if she were another woman,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Herra sanoi Ahialle: katso Jerobeamin emäntä tulee kysymään sinulta yhtä asiaa pojastansa, sillä hän on sairas; niin puhu sinä hänelle niin ja niin. Ja kuin hän tuli sisälle, piti hän itsensä outona.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Ahijah, Behold, the wife of Jeroboam cometh to ask a thing of thee for her son; for he is sick: thus and thus shalt thou say unto her: for it shall be, when she cometh in, that she shall feign herself to be another woman.

verses.latin_vulgate: audivit Ahias sonitum pedum ejus introëuntis per ostium, et ait : Ingredere, uxor Jeroboam : quare aliam te esse simulas ? ego autem missus sum ad te durus nuntius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִי֩ כִשְׁמֹ֨עַ אֲחִיָּ֜הוּ אֶת־ק֤וֹל רַגְלֶ֙יהָ֙ בָּאָ֣ה בַפֶּ֔תַח וַיֹּ֕אמֶר בֹּ֖אִי אֵ֣שֶׁת יָרׇבְעָ֑ם לָ֣מָּה זֶּ֗ה אַ֚תְּ מִתְנַכֵּרָ֔ה וְאָ֣נֹכִ֔י שָׁל֥וּחַ אֵלַ֖יִךְ קָשָֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Ahias heard the sound of her feet, coming in at the door, and said: Come in, thou wife of Jeroboam: why dost thou feign thyself to be another? But I am sent to thee with heavy tidings.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Ahia kuuli ovessa hänen jalkainsa töminän, sanoi hän: tule sisälle, sinä Jerobeamin emäntä: kuinkas itses niin outona pidät? Minä olen lähetetty sinun tykös kovan sanoman kanssa.
verses.king_james: And it was so, when Ahijah heard the sound of her feet, as she came in at the door, that he said, Come in, thou wife of Jeroboam; why feignest thou thyself to be another? for I am sent to thee with heavy tidings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vade, et dic Jeroboam : Hæc dicit Dominus Deus Israël : Quia exaltavi te de medio populi, et dedi te ducem super populum meum Israël,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְכִ֞י אִמְרִ֣י לְיָרׇבְעָ֗ם כֹּֽה־אָמַ֤ר יְהֹוָה֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל יַ֛עַן אֲשֶׁ֥ר הֲרִמֹתִ֖יךָ מִתּ֣וֹךְ הָעָ֑ם וָאֶתֶּנְךָ֣ נָגִ֔יד עַ֖ל עַמִּ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Go, and tell Jeroboam: Thus saith the Lord, the God of Israel: For as much as I exalted thee from among the people, and made thee prince over my people Israel;
verses.finnish_biblia: Mene ja sano Jerobeamille: näin sanoo Herra Israelin Jumala: että minä olen korottanut sinun kansan seasta ja pannut sinun minun kansani Israelin ruhtinaaksi,
verses.king_james: Go, tell Jeroboam, Thus saith the Lord God of Israel, Forasmuch as I exalted thee from among the people, and made thee prince over my people Israel,

verses.latin_vulgate: et scidi regnum domus David, et dedi illud tibi, et non fuisti sicut servus meus David, qui custodivit mandata mea, et secutus est me in toto corde suo, faciens quod placitum esset in conspectu meo :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶקְרַ֤ע אֶת־הַמַּמְלָכָה֙ מִבֵּ֣ית דָּוִ֔ד וָאֶתְּנֶ֖הָ לָ֑ךְ וְלֹֽא־הָיִ֜יתָ כְּעַבְדִּ֣י דָוִ֗ד אֲשֶׁר֩ שָׁמַ֨ר מִצְוֺתַ֜י וַֽאֲשֶׁר־הָלַ֤ךְ אַֽחֲרַי֙ בְּכׇל־לְבָב֔וֹ לַעֲשׂ֕וֹת רַ֖ק הַיָּשָׁ֥ר בְּעֵינָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And rent the kingdom away from the house of David, and gave it to thee, and thou hast not been as my servant, David, who kept my commandments, and followed me with all his heart, doing that which was well pleasing in my sight:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja olen reväissyt valtakunnan Davidin huoneelta pois, ja antanut sen sinulle: mutta et sinä ole ollut niinkuin minun palveliani David, joka piti minun käskyni ja vaelsi minun jälkeeni kaikella sydämellä, ja teki ainoastaan mitä minulle kelvollinen oli;
verses.king_james: And rent the kingdom away from the house of David, and gave it thee: and yet thou hast not been as my servant David, who kept my commandments, and who followed me with all his heart, to do that only which was right in mine eyes;

verses.latin_vulgate: sed operatus es mala super omnes qui fuerunt ante te, et fecisti tibi deos alienos et conflatiles, ut me ad iracundiam provocares, me autem projecisti post corpus tuum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתָּ֣רַע לַעֲשׂ֔וֹת מִכֹּ֖ל אֲשֶׁר־הָי֣וּ לְפָנֶ֑יךָ וַתֵּ֡לֶךְ וַתַּֽעֲשֶׂה־לְּךָ֩ אֱלֹהִ֨ים אֲחֵרִ֤ים וּמַסֵּכוֹת֙ לְהַכְעִיסֵ֔נִי וְאֹתִ֥י הִשְׁלַ֖כְתָּ אַחֲרֵ֥י גַוֶּֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But hast done evil above all that were before thee, and hast made thee strange gods, and molten gods, to provoke me to anger, and hast cast me behind thy back:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sinä olet tehnyt pahemmin kaikkia muita, jotka sinun edelläs olleet ovat, ja sinä olet mennyt ja tehnyt itselles vieraita jumalia ja valetuita kuvia kehoittaakses minua vihaan, ja olet heittänyt minun selkäs taa;
verses.king_james: But hast done evil above all that were before thee: for thou hast gone and made thee other gods, and molten images, to provoke me to anger, and hast cast me behind thy back:

verses.latin_vulgate: idcirco ecce ego inducam mala super domum Jeroboam, et percutiam de Jeroboam mingentem ad parietem, et clausum, et novissimum in Israël : et mundabo reliquias domus Jeroboam, sicut mundari solet fimus usque ad purum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן הִנְנִ֨י מֵבִ֤יא רָעָה֙ אֶל־בֵּ֣ית יָרׇבְעָ֔ם וְהִכְרַתִּ֤י לְיָֽרׇבְעָם֙ מַשְׁתִּ֣ין בְּקִ֔יר עָצ֥וּר וְעָז֖וּב בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וּבִֽעַרְתִּי֙ אַחֲרֵ֣י בֵית־יָרׇבְעָ֔ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר יְבַעֵ֥ר הַגָּלָ֖ל עַד־תֻּמּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore, behold I will bring evils upon the house of Jeroboam, and will cut off from Jeroboam him that pisseth against the wall, and him that is shut up, and the last in Israel: and I will sweep away the remnant of the house of Jeroboam, as dung is swept away till all be clean.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden katso, minä annan tulla pahaa Jerobeamin huoneen päälle, ja hukutan Jerobeamista sen, joka vetensä seinään heittää, suljetun ja hyljätyn Israelissa, ja käväisen Jerobeamin huoneen sukukunnan, niinkuin tunkio käväistään, perikatoonsa asti.
verses.king_james: Therefore, behold, I will bring evil upon the house of Jeroboam, and will cut off from Jeroboam him that pisseth against the wall, and him that is shut up and left in Israel, and will take away the remnant of the house of Jeroboam, as a man taketh away dung, till it be all gone.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui mortui fuerint de Jeroboam in civitate, comedent eos canes : qui autem mortui fuerint in agro, vorabunt eos aves cæli : quia Dominus locutus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַמֵּ֨ת לְיָרׇבְעָ֤ם בָּעִיר֙ יֹאכְל֣וּ הַכְּלָבִ֔ים וְהַמֵּת֙ בַּשָּׂדֶ֔ה יֹאכְל֖וּ ע֣וֹף הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם כִּ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה דִּבֵּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Them that shall die of Jeroboam in the city, the dogs shall eat: and them that shall die in the field, the birds of the air shall devour: for the Lord hath spoken it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka Jerobeamista kuolee kaupungissa, se pitää koirilta syötämän, mutta joka kuolee kedolla, se pitää taivaan linnuilta syötämän; sillä Herra on sen puhunut.
verses.king_james: Him that dieth of Jeroboam in the city shall the dogs eat; and him that dieth in the field shall the fowls of the air eat: for the Lord hath spoken it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu igitur surge, et vade in domum tuam : et in ipso introitu pedum tuorum in urbem, morietur puer,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַ֥תְּ ק֖וּמִי לְכִ֣י לְבֵיתֵ֑ךְ בְּבֹאָ֥הֿ רַגְלַ֛יִךְ הָעִ֖ירָה וּמֵ֥ת הַיָּֽלֶד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Arise thou, therefore, and go to thy house: and when thy feet shall be entering into the city, the child shall die,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin nouse sinä ja mene kotias, ja kuin jalkas astuu kaupunkiin, niin pojan pitää kuoleman.
verses.king_james: Arise thou therefore, get thee to thine own house: and when thy feet enter into the city, the child shall die.

verses.latin_vulgate: et planget eum omnis Israël, et sepeliet : iste enim solus inferetur de Jeroboam in sepulchrum, quia inventus est super eo sermo bonus a Domino Deo Israël in domo Jeroboam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְסָֽפְדוּ־ל֤וֹ כׇל־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ וְקָבְר֣וּ אֹת֔וֹ כִּי־זֶ֣ה לְבַדּ֔וֹ יָבֹ֥א לְיָרׇבְעָ֖ם אֶל־קָ֑בֶר יַ֣עַן נִמְצָא־ב֞וֹ דָּבָ֣ר ט֗וֹב אֶל־יְהֹוָ֛ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל בְּבֵ֥ית יָרׇבְעָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all Israel shall mourn for him, and shall bury him: for he only of Jeroboam shall be laid in a sepulchre, because in his regard there is found a good word from the Lord, the God of Israel, in the house of Jeroboam.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koko Israel itkee häntä ja hautaa hänen, sillä ainoastansa tämä tulee Jerobeamista hautaan, että jotakin hyvää on löydetty hänen tykönänsä, Herran Israelin Jumalan edessä, Jerobeamin huoneessa.
verses.king_james: And all Israel shall mourn for him, and bury him: for he only of Jeroboam shall come to the grave, because in him there is found some good thing toward the Lord God of Israel in the house of Jeroboam.

verses.latin_vulgate: Constituet autem sibi Dominus regem super Israël, qui percutiet domum Jeroboam in hac die, et in hoc tempore :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֵקִים֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה ל֥וֹ מֶ֙לֶךְ֙ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר יַכְרִ֛ית אֶת־בֵּ֥ית יָרׇבְעָ֖ם זֶ֣ה הַיּ֑וֹם וּמֶ֖ה גַּם־עָֽתָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord hath appointed himself a king over Israel, who shall cut off the house of Jeroboam in this day, and in this time:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra herättää itsellensä yhden Israelin kuninkaan, se on hävittävä Jerobeamin huoneen sinä päivänä: ja mitä jo on tapahtunut?
verses.king_james: Moreover the Lord shall raise him up a king over Israel, who shall cut off the house of Jeroboam that day: but what? even now.

verses.latin_vulgate: et percutiet Dominus Deus Israël, sicut moveri solet arundo in aqua : et evellet Israël de terra bona hac, quam dedit patribus eorum, et ventilabit eos trans flumen : quia fecerunt sibi lucos, ut irritarent Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִכָּ֨ה יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר יָנ֣וּד הַקָּנֶה֮ בַּמַּ֒יִם֒ וְנָתַ֣שׁ אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל מֵ֠עַ֠ל הָאֲדָמָ֨ה הַטּוֹבָ֤ה הַזֹּאת֙ אֲשֶׁ֤ר נָתַן֙ לַאֲב֣וֹתֵיהֶ֔ם וְזֵרָ֖ם מֵעֵ֣בֶר לַנָּהָ֑ר יַ֗עַן אֲשֶׁ֤ר עָשׂוּ֙ אֶת־אֲשֵׁ֣רֵיהֶ֔ם מַכְעִיסִ֖ים אֶת־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord God shall strike Israel as a reed is shaken in the water: and he shall root up Israel out of this good land, which he gave to their fathers, and shall scatter them beyond the river: because they have made to themselves groves, to provoke the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra lyö Israelin niinkuin ruoko häälyy vedessä, ja repii Israelin tästä hyvästä maasta, jonka hän heidän isillensä antanut on, ja hajottaa heidät virran ylitse; että he ovat itsellensä tehneet metsistöitä, vihoittaksensa Herraa:
verses.king_james: For the Lord shall smite Israel, as a reed is shaken in the water, and he shall root up Israel out of this good land, which he gave to their fathers, and shall scatter them beyond the river, because they have made their groves, provoking the Lord to anger.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tradet Dominus Israël propter peccata Jeroboam, qui peccavit, et peccare fecit Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיִתֵּ֖ן אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל בִּגְלַ֞ל חַטֹּ֤אות יָֽרׇבְעָם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר חָטָ֔א וַאֲשֶׁ֥ר הֶחֱטִ֖יא אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord shall give up Israel for the sins of Jeroboam, who hath sinned, and made Israel to sin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hylkää Israelin, Jerobeamin synnin tähden, joka syntiä teki ja saatti Israelin syntiä tekemään.
verses.king_james: And he shall give Israel up because of the sins of Jeroboam, who did sin, and who made Israel to sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surrexit itaque uxor Jeroboam, et abiit, et venit in Thersa : cumque illa ingrederetur limen domus, puer mortuus est,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתָּ֙קׇם֙ אֵ֣שֶׁת יָרׇבְעָ֔ם וַתֵּ֖לֶךְ וַתָּבֹ֣א תִרְצָ֑תָה הִ֛יא בָּאָ֥ה בְסַף־הַבַּ֖יִת וְהַנַּ֥עַר מֵֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the wife of Jeroboam arose, and departed, and came to Thersa: and when she was coming in to the threshold of the house, the child died,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jerobeamin emäntä nousi ja meni, ja tuli Tirtsaan; ja kuin hän astui huoneen kynnykseen, kuoli nuorukainen.
verses.king_james: And Jeroboam’s wife arose, and departed, and came to Tirzah: and when she came to the threshold of the door, the child died;

verses.latin_vulgate: et sepelierunt eum. Et planxit eum omnis Israël juxta sermonem Domini, quem locutus est in manu servi sui Ahiæ prophetæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְבְּר֥וּ אֹת֛וֹ וַיִּסְפְּדוּ־ל֖וֹ כׇּל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל כִּדְבַ֤ר יְהֹוָה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר דִּבֶּ֔ר בְּיַד־עַבְדּ֖וֹ אֲחִיָּ֥הוּ הַנָּבִֽיא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they buried him. And all Israel mourned for him, according to the word of the Lord, which he spoke by the hand of his servant Ahias, the prophet.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he hautasivat hänen, ja koko Israel itki häntä, Herran sanan jälkeen, jonka hän palveliansa propheta Ahian kautta sanonut oli.
verses.king_james: And they buried him; and all Israel mourned for him, according to the word of the Lord, which he spake by the hand of his servant Ahijah the prophet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem verborum Jeroboam, quomodo pugnaverit, et quomodo regnaverit, ecce scripta sunt in libro verborum dierum regum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֙תֶר֙ דִּבְרֵ֣י יָרׇבְעָ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר נִלְחַ֖ם וַאֲשֶׁ֣ר מָלָ֑ךְ הִנָּ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the rest of the acts of Jeroboam, how he fought, and how he reigned, behold they are written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempi Jerobeamista on sanomista, kuinka hän soti ja kuinka hän hallitsi: katso se on kirjoitettu Israelin kuningasten aikakirjassa.
verses.king_james: And the rest of the acts of Jeroboam, how he warred, and how he reigned, behold, they are written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dies autem quibus regnavit Jeroboam, viginti duo anni sunt : et dormivit cum patribus suis, regnavitque Nadab filius ejus pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַיָּמִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר מָלַ֣ךְ יָרׇבְעָ֔ם עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וּשְׁתַּ֖יִם שָׁנָ֑ה וַיִּשְׁכַּב֙ עִם־אֲבֹתָ֔יו וַיִּמְלֹ֛ךְ נָדָ֥ב בְּנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the days that Jeroboam reigned, were two and twenty years: and he slept with his fathers: and Nadab, his son, reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja aika, jonka Jerobeam hallitsi, oli kaksikolmattakymmentä ajastaikaa; ja hän nukkui isäinsä kanssa; ja hänen poikansa Nadab tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: And the days which Jeroboam reigned were two and twenty years: and he slept with his fathers, and Nadab his son reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Roboam filius Salomonis regnavit in Juda. Quadraginta et unius anni erat Roboam cum regnare cœpisset : decem et septem annos regnavit in Jerusalem civitate, quam elegit Dominus ut poneret nomen suum ibi, ex omnibus tribubus Israël. Nomen autem matris ejus Naama Ammanitis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּרְחַבְעָם֙ בֶּן־שְׁלֹמֹ֔ה מָלַ֖ךְ בִּיהוּדָ֑ה בֶּן־אַרְבָּעִ֣ים וְאַחַ֣ת שָׁנָה֩ רְחַבְעָ֨ם בְּמׇלְכ֜וֹ וּֽשְׁבַ֨ע עֶשְׂרֵ֥ה שָׁנָ֣ה ׀ מָלַ֣ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלַ֗͏ִם הָ֠עִ֠יר אֲשֶׁר־בָּחַ֨ר יְהֹוָ֜ה לָשׂ֨וּם אֶת־שְׁמ֥וֹ שָׁם֙ מִכֹּל֙ שִׁבְטֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְשֵׁ֣ם אִמּ֔וֹ נַעֲמָ֖ה הָעַמֹּנִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Roboam, the son of Solomon, reigned in Juda: Roboam was one and forty years old when he began to reign: and he reigned seventeen years in Jerusalem, the city which the Lord chose out of all the tribes of Israel to put his name there. And his mother's name was Naama, an Ammonitess.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin oli Rehabeam, Salomon poika kuningas Juudassa, ja oli yhdenviidettäkymmentä ajastaikainen tultuansa kuninkaaksi, ja hallitsi seitsemäntoistakymmentä ajastaikaa Jerusalemissa, siinä kaupungissa, jonka Herra valinnut on kaikista Israelin sukukunnista, pannaksensa siihen nimensä; ja hänen äitinsä nimi oli Naema Ammonilainen.
verses.king_james: And Rehoboam the son of Solomon reigned in Judah. Rehoboam was forty and one years old when he began to reign, and he reigned seventeen years in Jerusalem, the city which the Lord did choose out of all the tribes of Israel, to put his name there. And his mother’s name was Naamah an Ammonitess.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fecit Judas malum coram Domino, et irritaverunt eum super omnibus quæ fecerant patres eorum in peccatis suis quæ peccaverunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֧עַשׂ יְהוּדָ֛ה הָרַ֖ע בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיְקַנְא֣וּ אֹת֗וֹ מִכֹּל֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשׂ֣וּ אֲבֹתָ֔ם בְּחַטֹּאתָ֖ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר חָטָֽאוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Juda did evil in the sight of the Lord, and provoked him above all that their fathers had done, in their sins which they committed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Juuda teki pahaa Herran edessä; ja he saattivat hänen enempi kiivaaksi, kuin kaikki heidän esiisänsä olivat tehneet synneillänsä, joita he tekivät.
verses.king_james: And Judah did evil in the sight of the Lord, and they provoked him to jealousy with their sins which they had committed, above all that their fathers had done.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ædificaverunt enim et ipsi sibi aras, et statuas, et lucos super omnem collem excelsum, et subter omnem arborem frondosam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּבְנ֨וּ גַם־הֵ֧מָּה לָהֶ֛ם בָּמ֥וֹת וּמַצֵּב֖וֹת וַאֲשֵׁרִ֑ים עַ֚ל כׇּל־גִּבְעָ֣ה גְבֹהָ֔ה וְתַ֖חַת כׇּל־עֵ֥ץ רַעֲנָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: For they also built them altars, and statues, and groves, upon every high hill, and under every green tree:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hekin rakensivat itsellensä korkeuksia, patsaita ja metsistöitä kaikille korkeille vuorille ja kaikkein viheriäisten puiden alle.
verses.king_james: For they also built them high places, and images, and groves, on every high hill, and under every green tree.

verses.latin_vulgate: sed et effeminati fuerunt in terra, feceruntque omnes abominationes gentium quas attrivit Dominus ante faciem filiorum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַם־קָדֵ֖שׁ הָיָ֣ה בָאָ֑רֶץ עָשׂ֗וּ כְּכֹל֙ הַתּוֹעֲבֹ֣ת הַגּוֹיִ֔ם אֲשֶׁר֙ הוֹרִ֣ישׁ יְהֹוָ֔ה מִפְּנֵ֖י בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: There were also the effeminate in the land, and they did according to all the abominations of the people, whom the Lord had destroyed before the face of the children of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja maakunnassa oli huorintekijöitä; ja he tekivät kaikki pakanain kauhistukset, jotka Herra Israelin lasten edestä oli ajanut pois.
verses.king_james: And there were also sodomites in the land: and they did according to all the abominations of the nations which the Lord cast out before the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: In quinto autem anno regni Roboam, ascendit Sesac rex Ægypti in Jerusalem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֛י בַּשָּׁנָ֥ה הַחֲמִישִׁ֖ית לַמֶּ֣לֶךְ רְחַבְעָ֑ם עָלָ֛ה (שושק) [שִׁישַׁ֥ק] מֶלֶךְ־מִצְרַ֖יִם עַל־יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And in the fifth year of the reign of Roboam, Sesac, king of Egypt, came up against Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtui viidennellä kuningas Rehabeamin ajastajalla, että Sisak Egyptin kuningas meni Jerusalemia vastaan,
verses.king_james: And it came to pass in the fifth year of king Rehoboam, that Shishak king of Egypt came up against Jerusalem:

verses.latin_vulgate: et tulit thesauros domus Domini, et thesauros regios, et universa diripuit : scuta quoque aurea, quæ fecerat Salomon :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֞ח אֶת־אֹצְר֣וֹת בֵּית־יְהֹוָ֗ה וְאֶת־אֽוֹצְרוֹת֙ בֵּ֣ית הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ וְאֶת־הַכֹּ֖ל לָקָ֑ח וַיִּקַּח֙ אֶת־כׇּל־מָגִנֵּ֣י הַזָּהָ֔ב אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשָׂ֖ה שְׁלֹמֹֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he took away the treasures of the house of the Lord, and the king's treasures, and carried all off: as also the shields of gold which Solomon had made:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja otti Herran huoneen tavarat, ja kuninkaan huoneen tavarat, ja kaiken mitä sieltä taidettiin ottaa, ja otti kaikki kultaiset kilvet, jota Salomo oli antanut tehdä,
verses.king_james: And he took away the treasures of the house of the Lord, and the treasures of the king’s house; he even took away all: and he took away all the shields of gold which Solomon had made.

verses.latin_vulgate: pro quibus fecit rex Roboam scuta ærea, et tradidit ea in manum ducum scutariorum, et eorum qui excubabant ante ostium domus regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֨עַשׂ הַמֶּ֤לֶךְ רְחַבְעָם֙ תַּחְתָּ֔ם מָגִנֵּ֖י נְחֹ֑שֶׁת וְהִפְקִ֗יד עַל־יַד֙ שָׂרֵ֣י הָרָצִ֔ים הַשֹּׁ֣מְרִ֔ים פֶּ֖תַח בֵּ֥ית הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Roboam made shields of brass instead of them, and delivered them into the hand of the captains of the shieldbearers, and of them that kept watch before the gate of the king's house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joiden siaan kuningas Rehabeam antoi tehdä vaskisia kilpiä, ja antoi ne ylimmäisten vartioittensa haltuun, jotka kuninkaan huoneen ovea vartioitsivat.
verses.king_james: And king Rehoboam made in their stead brasen shields, and committed them unto the hands of the chief of the guard, which kept the door of the king’s house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque ingrederetur rex in domum Domini, portabant ea qui præeundi habebant officium : et postea reportabant ad armamentarium scutariorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֛י מִדֵּי־בֹ֥א הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה יִשָּׂאוּם֙ הָרָצִ֔ים וֶהֱשִׁיב֖וּם אֶל־תָּ֥א הָרָצִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the king went into the house of the Lord, they whose office it was to go before him, carried them: and afterwards they brought them back to the armoury of the shieldbearers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja niin usein kuin kuningas meni Herran huoneesen, kantoivat vartiat niitä, ja veivät ne vartiakamariin jälleen.
verses.king_james: And it was so, when the king went into the house of the Lord, that the guard bare them, and brought them back into the guard chamber.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem sermonum Roboam, et omnia quæ fecit, ecce scripta sunt in libro sermonum dierum regum Juda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֛תֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י רְחַבְעָ֖ם וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה הֲלֹא־הֵ֣מָּה כְתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֥י יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now the rest of the acts of Roboam, and all that he did, behold they are written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Juda.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempi Rehabeamin asioista on sanomista ja kaikista mitä hän tehnyt oli: eikö se ole kirjoitettu Juudan kuningasten aikakirjassa?
verses.king_james: Now the rest of the acts of Rehoboam, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuitque bellum inter Roboam et Jeroboam cunctis diebus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִלְחָמָ֨ה הָיְתָ֧ה בֵין־רְחַבְעָ֛ם וּבֵ֥ין יָרׇבְעָ֖ם כׇּל־הַיָּמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there was war between Roboam and Jeroboam always.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Rehabeamin ja Jerobeamin välillä oli sota kaikkina heidän päivinänsä.
verses.king_james: And there was war between Rehoboam and Jeroboam all their days.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dormivitque Roboam cum patribus suis, et sepultus est cum eis in civitate David : nomen autem matris ejus Naama Ammanitis : et regnavit Abiam filius ejus pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁכַּ֨ב רְחַבְעָ֜ם עִם־אֲבֹתָ֗יו וַיִּקָּבֵ֤ר עִם־אֲבֹתָיו֙ בְּעִ֣יר דָּוִ֔ד וְשֵׁ֣ם אִמּ֔וֹ נַעֲמָ֖ה הָעַמֹּנִ֑ית וַיִּמְלֹ֛ךְ אֲבִיָּ֥ם בְּנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Roboam slept with his fathers, and was buried with them, in the city of David: and his mother's name was Naama, an Ammonitess: and Abiam, his son, reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Rehabeam nukkui isäinsä kanssa ja haudattiin isäinsä tykö Davidin kaupunkiin. Ja hänen äitinsä nimi oli Naema Ammonilainen. Ja hänen poikansa Abiam tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: And Rehoboam slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David. And his mother’s name was Naamah an Ammonitess. And Abijam his son reigned in his stead.
